title: cyperus leptanthos
intro: Cyperus leptanthos, also known as the dwarf papyrus or smallflower umbrella sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cyperus leptanthos include its ability to ease coughs, reduce fever, and promote digestion. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion, typically by steeping the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health concerns.
